text.title: Static Application Security Testing (SAST) in CI/CD Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals on the input to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Use when the right path is ambiguous.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the repo's host GitHub AND is the stack single-language compiled?

branch.question: Do you need custom rules for project-specific patterns (secrets, ORM misuse)?

conclusion.verdict: Semgrep + custom .semgrep rules + SARIF to GitHub
CodeQL with security-extended + security-and-quality query packs

text.example: github_native=true → custom_rules=true (hardcoded-secret rule needed) → Semgrep + custom rules + SARIF to GitHub. References rule pin-scanner-and-rules.
